          -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
    --swiper-theme-color: #007aff;
    --swiper-navigation-size: 44px;
    --saVideoTilePosition: auto 15px 15px auto;
    --sa-color-light: #fbfbfb;
    --sa-color-dark: #393939;
    --blue: #007bff;
    --indigo: #6610f2;
    --purple: #6f42c1;
    --pink: #e83e8c;
    --red: #dc3545;
    --orange: #fd7e14;
    --yellow: #ffc107;
    --green: #28a745;
    --teal: #20c997;
    --cyan: #17a2b8;
    --white: #fff;
    --gray: #6c757d;
    --gray-dark: #343a40;
    --primary: #007bff;
    --secondary: #6c757d;
    --success: #28a745;
    --info: #17a2b8;
    --warning: #ffc107;
    --danger: #dc3545;
    --light: #f8f9fa;
    --dark: #343a40;
    --breakpoint-xs: 0;
    --breakpoint-sm: 576px;
    --breakpoint-md: 768px;
    --breakpoint-lg: 992px;
    --breakpoint-xl: 1200px;
    --font-family-sans-serif: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,"Segoe UI",Roboto,"Helvetica Neue",Arial,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji","Segoe UI Symbol","Noto Color Emoji";
    --font-family-monospace: SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Monaco,Consolas,"Liberation Mono","Courier New",monospace;
    --shortsThemeColor: #000000;
    --shortsInvertColor: #eee;
    text-align: left;
    font-weight: 400;
    color: #222;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 22px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    list-style: none;
    z-index: 1;
    display: block;
    touch-action: pan-y;
    perspective: 1200px;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
    font-family: 'Segoe UI', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Roboto', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif !important;
    width: 70vw !important;
